## Summary

Describe the checklist, template, source, or repository-configuration change.

## Review checklist

- [ ] The change preserves the student-lab workflow and go/no-go rule.
- [ ] New or changed security guidance is backed by a verifiable source where appropriate.
- [ ] Draft/public-comment sources are labeled as watch items, not mandatory requirements.
- [ ] Links are public and stable where possible.
- [ ] Templates remain copy-and-fill friendly.
- [ ] No secrets, local paths, private emails beyond the public security contact, or internal network details were added.
- [ ] If `.github/` files changed, workflow YAML and Dependabot YAML remain valid.

## Notes for reviewers

Add any concerns about scope, institutional policy, safety, privacy, IRB, export control, or maintenance burden.
